# grafanasilence Provider

Provider for managing Grafana Alertmanager silences.

## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "grafanasilence" {
  url  = "https://grafana.example.com" # or set GRAFANA_URL
  auth = "glsa_xxxxxxxxxxxx"           # or set GRAFANA_AUTH
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `auth` (String, Sensitive) API token or user:pass for basic auth. Can also be set with the GRAFANA_AUTH environment variable.
- `url` (String) Grafana instance base URL. Can also be set with the GRAFANA_URL environment variable.
